widgetsBundle.title: Video Streaming
widgetsBundle.description: Play video streams in a dashboard widget.

widgetTypes.name: HLS Video Stream
widgetTypes.description: Plays an HLS (.m3u8) stream — live or recorded. The stream URL is read from a configured data key, with an optional static fallback URL.

descriptor.templateHtml: No stream URL configured

settingsForm.name: Fallback stream URL
settingsForm.hint: Optional fallback URL. Used when the data key is empty or missing.

settingsForm.name: Autoplay
settingsForm.hint: Start playback automatically when the stream loads. If the browser blocks autoplay with sound, the widget falls back to muted autoplay.

settingsForm.name: Start muted
settingsForm.hint: Start playback muted. Users can unmute via the video controls.

settingsForm.name: Show video controls
settingsForm.hint: Show video controls (play/pause, volume, fullscreen, picture-in-picture).

settingsForm.name: Back buffer length
settingsForm.hint: Seconds of already-played live video kept in memory for seeking back. Valid range: 0–60. Set to 0 to disable seek-back.

widgetTypes.name: WebRTC Video Stream
widgetTypes.description: Plays a live WebRTC stream via WHEP signaling. Sub-second latency, live-only. The WHEP URL is read from a configured data key, with an optional static fallback URL.

descriptor.templateHtml:
LIVE
No stream URL configured

settingsForm.name: Fallback stream URL
settingsForm.hint: Optional fallback WHEP URL. Used when the data key is empty or missing. Example: http://localhost:8889/camera1/whep.

settingsForm.name: Autoplay
settingsForm.hint: Start playback automatically once the WebRTC session connects. If the browser blocks autoplay with sound, the widget falls back to muted autoplay.

settingsForm.name: Start muted
settingsForm.hint: Start playback muted. Users can unmute via the video controls.

settingsForm.name: Show video controls
settingsForm.hint: Show video controls (play/pause, volume, fullscreen, picture-in-picture).

settingsForm.name: Show LIVE indicator
settingsForm.hint: Show a pulsing red LIVE badge in the top-left while the stream is playing.

settingsForm.name: STUN server URL
settingsForm.hint: Optional STUN server URL (e.g. stun:stun.l.google.com:19302). STUN (Session Traversal Utilities for NAT) lets the browser and MediaMTX discover each other's public IP addresses and initiate a direct WebRTC connection. Very restrictive networks may need a TURN server instead.
